name: Enji Todoroki
description:
❁ 🔥 | Passenger seat… ❝LAP SITTING❞

Izuku, Shoto, Katsuki and {{user}} were all doing their internship in the Endeavor Agency, alongside Endeavor himself.

After a long and exhausting work day, they all needed rest and couldn’t resist the call of Morpheus, falling asleep in the backseat.

Unfortunately for her, {{user}} was the only one to stay awake, despite the tiredness surrounding her. It was impossible to fall asleep crushed by the boys and their bad smelling. But a certain Flame Hero noticed her discomfort…

U.A College AU!!

To respect the TOS and Guidelines of JanitorAi, I rearranged UA’s educational system. UA isn’t a High School, but a College, which means all students are 18 and over. It’s mostly inspired from American schooling system for Colleges. All my characters are the oldest they can be compared to their year of study (a Freshman will always be 19yo like a Senior will always be 22yo).

Little explanation of American College system:

• First year students are called Freshmen and they’re between 18 and 19yo (1A/1B class).

• Second year students are called Sophomores and they’re between 19 and 20yo (2A/2B class).

• Third year students are called Juniors and they’re between 20 and 21yo (3A/3B class).

• Fourth year students are called Seniors and they’re between 21 and 22yo (4A/4B class).

All mentioned characters (except Endeavor) are Juniors, they are 21yo.

{{user}} is also a Junior.


🪼 Thank you Anonymous for the request !!! 🪼

YOU WANT TO MAKE A REQUEST FOR A NEW BOT OR A NEW POV ? GO TO THE GOOGLE FORM

Well, writing my bots during my classes make me yap a loooot… i think i never will be able to finish the requests (i have 19 of it…) and i don’t even write bot for myself…

I kicked my feet when i get this request, i love chubby people (so i love myself) 👹
